Patch Set 3: -Verified

> Build Failed
 > 
 > https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/78019/ : FAILURE
 > 

The failure is related to building with zfs-0.8.4:

checking whether blkg_tryget() is available... no

 zfs-0.8.4/module/zfs/vdev_disk.c:520:22: error: implicit declaration of function 'vdev_blkg_tryget'; did you mean 'blkg_tryget'? [-Werror=implicit-function-declaration]
   if (q->root_blkg && vdev_blkg_tryget(q->root_blkg))
                       ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                       blkg_tryget

Patch Set 3:

The issue was fixed in zfs 2.0.0:

blkg_tryget config test: initialize struct #10713 #11049

https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/issues/10713

https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/pull/11049

Patch Set 3:

I will rebase this patch on https://review.whamcloud.com/40822, which updates zfs version to 2.0.0.

Patch Set 7:

> I just found it was a WARNING instead of ERROR with RHEL 8.3 kernel 4.18.0-240.1.1.el8_3:

That's interesting... probably a change in the kernel built system between 4.18 and 5.10.  There does seem to have been a lot of change there lately.
Thanks.

parents.subject: LU-14170 build: Update ZFS version to 2.0.0

commit.subject: LU-13839 kernel: RHEL 8.3 server support
commit.message:
LU-13839 kernel: RHEL 8.3 server support

This patch makes changes to support RHEL 8.3 release with
kernel 4.18.0-240.1.1.el8_3 for Lustre server.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el8.3 serverdistro=el8.3 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs \
clientdistro=el8.3 serverdistro=el8.3 testlist=sanity

Change-Id: I2aa2efaf86b5f244fcb1dd95be1d0bfe04e8d245
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/40729
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
